title: The Development Board Laws (Repeal) Ordinance, 1986
description: An Ordinance to repeal the Khulna Division Development Board Ordinance, 1976, the Rajshahi Division Development Board Ordinance, 1976, the Dhaka Division Development Board Ordinance, 1976, the Chittagong District Development Board Ordinance, 1982 and the Comilla, Noakhali and Sylhet Districts Development Board Ordinance, 1982. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Khulna Division Development Board Ordinance, 1976 ...

provisions.title: 1. Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Ordinance may be called the Development Board Laws (Repeal) Ordinance, 1986 .
(2) It shall come into force on the 1st day of July, 1986.

provisions.title: 2. Repeal of Development Board Laws and savings
